violations.description: FOOD DISPLAY SERVICE AND TRANSPORT TEMP (5 pts): Time rather than temperature was being used but in an inproper manner as a control for public health protection. Sushi rice is not labelled with times it is made and time ii is to be discarded and written procedures for this not being kept Educated staff on proper procedue
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in kitchen.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensils noted being stored with the handles laying in the corn starch and the brown rice
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Door gaskets on reachin coolers noted not in good repair.

FOOD DISPLAY SERVICE AND TRANSPORT TEMP (5 pts): Time rather than temperature was being used improperly as a control for public health protection for the sushi rice. Food not marked with time made and time to be discarded. Corrected upon request and education given
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep area.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Door gaskets on reachin coolers noted not in good repair.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensils noted being stored with the handles laying in the flour and rice
